title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall
main_description: The crew pushes through brutal one-on-one fights as Robin’s execution path grows closer. The chapter mainly follows CP9, Sanji, Whitebeard, Franky, keeping the focus on the Enies Lobby Climax storyline.
